name: swarm-differential-eslint-runner
description: Isolated ESLint 9 toolchain for the v11 differential. Kept separate from the repo's own ESLint 10 because eslint-plugin-security 3.x still calls the context.getSourceCode API that ESLint 10 removed. node_modules here is gitignored and regenerated by `npm install` in this directory (the differential runner does this automatically).
